message:
fix: bypass nested PTY wrapper for Claude Code provider

Claude Code is a full TUI application that manages its own terminal
I/O, cursor positioning, and screen state. The SmartRunner's nested
PTY wrapper (used for output capture in non-interactive providers)
conflicts with Claude Code's terminal handling, causing session hangs
when the two PTY layers compete for terminal control.

This adds an early-return path for the "claude" provider that skips
the PTY wrapper entirely and delegates directly to the underlying
Runner, matching the existing bypass for the "cursor" provider.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
